typecheck.details: Kernel builds successfully. 31 pre-existing dead_code warnings (out of scope).

lint.details: 69 clippy warnings (style/lint suggestions, all pre-existing). No errors.

appliedUpdates.description: Created .factory/library/miri-compatibility.md documenting per-file Miri test results, known limitations (buddy provenance, ipc UB out of scope), and performance characteristics (scheduler_state ~1400s under Miri).
Added miri_single command for per-file Miri testing. The blanket miri command exits on first failure (buddy), masking results from other files. Per-file execution is the practical approach.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The kernel-auditor skill's Step 8 (Commit) assumes every feature produces code changes. Add guidance for verification-only/read-only features to skip the commit step. This avoids workers creating empty or unnecessary commits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test-infra-verification worker correctly identified this gap in skillFeedback. The feature was verification-only — running tests, building kernel, and assessing Miri — with no code changes expected or made. The skill procedure doesn't explicitly handle this case.
